texto: Thanks to the nation's testing mania (which I like to call 'No Child Left Untested' rather than 'No Child Left Behind'), children are being barraged with a nonstop volley of standardized tests. From kindergarten to graduate school, students are subjected to an unprecedented number of high-stakes tests
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laurie E. Rozakis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “Thanks to the nation's testing mania (which I like to call 'No Child Left Untested' rather than '…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, children, nonfiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nonfiction e spelling.
